narrative:
Fremont City 4-D (precinct in Sandusky County) has 488 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.5 percentage points.
